First sight of the Erg Chebbi dunes

seo.seoTitle: Morocco Motorcycle Expedition — 8 Days from the Rif to the Sahara | HiddenAtlas
seo.seoDescription: The definitive Morocco motorcycle itinerary: Chefchaouen, Fes, Todra Gorge, Aït Benhaddou, two nights in the Sahara at Erg Chebbi, Marrakech and the Atlantic coast — structured for a group of riders.

notes.bestSeason: March to May and September to November. Summer temperatures in the Sahara exceed 45°C; winter passes can carry snow.
notes.ridingDays: Days 2, 4 and 6 are long-distance riding days (280–500 km). Days 3 and 7 are shorter and more scenic. Day 5 is a desert day with no significant riding.
notes.fuelPlanning: Fuel between Midelt and Errachidia is available but gaps exist. Fill in Midelt and Errachidia before the gorge roads. Fill in Ouarzazate before the Tizi n'Tichka.
notes.ferryTiming: Algeciras–Ceuta runs frequently (35 min, hourly). Tarifa–Tangier Med takes 90 min. Book outward and return crossings the day before to guarantee your slot with loaded bikes.
notes.roadQuality: Main routes (N1, N8, N9, N13) are well-surfaced. The Dades switchback section has loose gravel in places. The final approach to Merzouga can be sandy within 15 km of the dune edge.
notes.imageStatus: Gallery and research images are placeholders. Day images require local files in day-images/ before rendering.
